programs.title: Enemy Mine
programs.desc: Sci-fi adventure starring Dennis Quaid and Louis Gossett Jr. A human and his alien enemy find themselves stranded alone on a hostile planet, where they must work together to survive.

programs.title: The League of Extraordinary Gentlemen
programs.desc: Fantasy with Sean Connery. In an alternative Victorian age, can Allan Quatermain, Dorian Gray, Captain Nemo, Mina Harker and the Invisible Man avert a war.

programs.title: How to Have Sex
programs.desc: Incisive coming-of-age drama with Mia McKenna-Bruce. Three teenage girls go on holiday looking for a taste of hedonism. But is the reality as simple or as fun as the dream.

programs.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programs.desc: Part four of the Tom Cruise action-thriller franchise. The Impossible Missions Force fight to clear their name, while also trying to avert nuclear war. Busy, busy, busy.

programs.title: Old Boys
programs.desc: Charming comedy set in an all-boys school in the 80s. An awkward geek gets caught in a love triangle with a teacher's daughter and the school sports star.
